Notes: Roast/rest/cool is fixed for one oven load; labor scales with washing, panning, peeling, portioning, labeling, and added cleanup.
SOP expectation says peeling and portioning is 45-60 minutes for 2 beet batches with 2 people; this planning model uses a blended 45 minutes per raw bag.
Use one oven-load fixed time if the oven can hold all pans; add another fixed roast/rest/cool block if a second oven round is needed.
Large runs are mostly limited by peeling and portioning, not roasting.
Plan extra people on peeling/portioning if the elapsed day is too long.
If sink, pan, or cart space is tight, stage washing/panning while the first pans are roasting.
Roasting should not be multiplied by bag count unless oven capacity forces multiple oven rounds.
